channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INVPRECQ] Investment & Precision Castings Board Meeting on May 19, 2026
item.description:
Investment & Precision Castings Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 19, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and discuss matters related to the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The trading window, which was closed from April 1, 2026, will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are uploaded.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 19, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered at the board meeting.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours after results are uploaded.
  • Discussion on matters related to the upcoming Annual General Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INVESTMENT & PRECISION CASTINGS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DJSSS] DJS Stock & Shares to Surrender Trading Memberships
item.description:
The Board of Directors of DJS Stock & Shares Ltd has approved the application for voluntary surrender of its trading memberships across multiple exchanges including BSE, NSE, MSEI, and Calcutta Stock Exchange, as well as its membership with NSE Clearing Corporation Limited. The board also approved the alteration of the main object clause of the Memorandum of Association and a change of the company name, both subject to member approval. The board meeting was held on May 6, 2026, and concluded within 45 minutes.

  • DJS Stock & Shares to surrender trading memberships across multiple exchanges.
  • Board approves alteration of Memorandum of Association's object clause.
  • Company name change approved, pending member approval.
  • Meeting held on May 6, 2026, at the registered office in Mumbai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DJS STOCK & SHARES LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ACME] Acme Resources Appoints Azharuddin & Associates as Auditor
item.description:
Acme Resources Ltd has appointed M/s. Azharuddin & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for the financial year 2025-26, filling the vacancy caused by the resignation of Mr. Vikas Gera. The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors on May 6, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. M/s. Azharuddin & Associates is a peer-reviewed firm of Company Secretaries in Practice.

  • Azharuddin & Associates appointed as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-26.
  • Appointment follows resignation of previous auditor, Vikas Gera.
  • Board approval based on Audit Committee recommendation on May 6, 2026.
  • Azharuddin & Associates is a peer-reviewed firm of Company Secretaries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Acme Resources Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [GODREJCP] GCPL Approves FY26 Audited Results, ₹5 Interim Dividend
item.description:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd (GCPL) approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also declared an interim dividend of ₹5 per share (500% on face value of ₹1 each) for the financial year 2026-27, with a record date of May 12, 2026, and payment on or before June 4, 2026. The 26th Annual General Meeting will be held on August 7, 2026, via video conferencing. Mr. Sudhir Sitapati's re-appointment as Managing Director & CEO for 5 years from October 18, 2026, was approved, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Nadir Godrej will retire as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director effective August 7, 2026.

  • GCPL approves audited financial results for FY26 with unmodified auditor's report.
  • Interim dividend of ₹5 per share declared for FY26-27, payable by June 4, 2026.
  • 26th AGM scheduled for August 7, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Sudhir Sitapati re-appointed as MD & CEO for 5 years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Nadir Godrej to retire as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director on August 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODREJ CONSUMER PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GREAVESCOT] Greaves Cotton FY26 Revenue Up 18% YoY to ₹3437 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Greaves Cotton Ltd reported a 22% YoY growth in Q4 FY26, with consolidated revenue of ₹1000 crore and standalone revenue of ₹698 crore. For FY26, consolidated revenue reached ₹3437 crore, an 18% increase YoY, while standalone revenue stood at ₹2365 crore, up 19% YoY. The company's international business contributed 13% to its Energy, Mobility & Industrial businesses. E-2W VAHAN registrations for Greaves Electric Mobility reached 61,597 units in FY26, a 51% annual growth.

  • Consolidated revenue for Q4 FY26 stood at ₹1000 crore, up 22% YoY.
  • FY26 consolidated revenue reached ₹3437 crore, up 18% YoY.
  • International business contribution increased to 13% of core business revenue.
  • E-2W VAHAN registrations grew 51% to 61,597 units in FY26.
  • Standalone revenue for FY26 was ₹2365 crore, a 19% YoY increase.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREAVES COTTON LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [MOTILALOFS] Motilal Oswal AMC to Act as Sponsor of Pension Fund
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Motilal Oswal Asset Management Company (MOAMC), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Motilal Oswal Financial Services, has received approval from the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) to act as a Sponsor of Pension Fund under the National Pension System (NPS). MOAMC will establish a separate pension fund entity to manage NPS contributions and pension assets, subject to necessary registrations and approvals. This move aims to strengthen Motilal Oswal's presence in the retirement and pension fund management space.

  • MOAMC received a Letter of Appointment from PFRDA on May 05, 2026.
  • MOAMC will establish and operationalise a separate Pension Fund company.
  • The company aims to bring a research-driven investment approach to NPS.
  • This expands Motilal Oswal's participation in long-term retirement planning.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOTILAL OSWAL FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MEDPLUS] Medplus Subsidiary Faces Drug License Suspension; ₹16 Lacs Impact
item.description:
Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, a subsidiary of Medplus Health Services Ltd, has received a suspension order for a drug license for one of its stores in Chhattisgarh. The suspension, issued by the Assistant Drugs Controller of Durg District, is for 65 days and is based on violations under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945. The company estimates a potential revenue loss of ₹16.00 lacs due to the suspension.

  • Medplus subsidiary, Optival Health, receives drug license suspension in Chhattisgarh.
  • The suspension is for 65 days due to violations of drug regulations.
  • Potential revenue loss for Medplus is estimated at ₹16.00 lacs.
  • The order was received on May 5, 2026, from Durg District authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medplus Health Services Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [WARRENTEA] Warren Tea: NCLT Order on Amalgamation Scheme
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has issued an order directing Warren Tea Ltd. to convene meetings of shareholders and creditors regarding the Scheme of Amalgamation with Maple Hotels & Resorts Limited. The meetings for Equity Shareholders of Warren Tea and Maple Hotels are scheduled for June 15, 2026, while the meeting for Unsecured Creditors of Maple Hotels will be held virtually on June 18, 2026. The order was uploaded on the NCLT website on May 5, 2026, and received by the company via email on the same day.

  • NCLT directs Warren Tea to convene meetings for amalgamation scheme.
  • Equity Shareholders' meetings set for June 15, 2026.
  • Unsecured Creditors' meeting to be held virtually on June 18, 2026.
  • Amalgamation scheme involves Maple Hotels & Resorts Limited.
  • Order received by Warren Tea on May 5, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WARREN TEA LTD.-$ | Category: Merger

item.title: [AJANTSOY] Ajanta Soya: Harshit Finvest Sells 3.14% Stake
item.description:
Harshit Finvest Pvt Ltd sold 25,22,385 shares of Ajanta Soya Ltd, representing 3.14% of the total share capital, through open market transactions. This sale reduced Harshit Finvest's holding in Ajanta Soya from 4.21% to 1.07%. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The equity share capital of Ajanta Soya remains at ₹160965980 after the transaction.

  • Harshit Finvest Pvt Ltd sold 3.14% stake in Ajanta Soya Ltd.
  • The sale was executed through open market transactions.
  • Harshit Finvest's holding in Ajanta Soya decreased to 1.07% after the sale.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
  • Ajanta Soya's equity share capital remains unchanged at ₹160965980.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AJANTA SOYA LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SOUTHBANK] South Indian Bank Net Profit Up 11.69% to ₹1,455 Cr in FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

South Indian Bank reported a net profit of ₹1,455.14 Cr for FY26, an 11.69% increase compared to ₹1,302.88 Cr in FY25. The bank achieved its highest-ever business of ₹2,23,620 Cr and operating profit of ₹2,373 Cr. The Board recommended a 45% dividend. Gross NPA dropped by 177 bps to 1.43%, and NNPA reduced by 63 bps to 0.29%. Retail deposits grew by 14.67%, and NRI deposits increased by 11.92%. Gross advances grew by 14.50%.

  • South Indian Bank's FY26 net profit rose 11.69% to ₹1,455.14 Cr.
  • The bank's highest-ever business reached ₹2,23,620 Cr.
  • Gross NPA decreased by 177 bps to 1.43% Y-o-Y.
  • The Board of Directors recommended a 45% dividend.
  • Gross advances grew by 14.50% Y-o-Y.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOUTH INDIAN BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
